dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires retracement detection which cannot be precisely coded without multi-bar logic. Entry conditions approximate the signal: price at or above previous close (support level) AND previous close above central pivot. Exit uses a reversal condition (close below prev_close) as AUTHOR_SILENT. Hold_days_max set to 1 for intraday day trade context mentioned in source material. Central pivot mapped to 'pivot' indicator (standard pivot point).

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires retracement detection which cannot be precisely coded without multi-bar logic. Entry conditions approximate the signal: price at or above previous close (support level) AND previous close above central pivot. Exit uses a reversal condition (close below prev_close) as AUTHOR_SILENT. Hold_days_max set to 1 for intraday day trade context mentioned in source material. Central pivot mapped to 'pivot' indicator (standard pivot point).

source_rule_text: Take a long trade on retracement when price finds support at the previous close, which is positioned above the central pivot.
